entities.name: Cross-channel consistency
entities.context: Principle that integrity is verified through coherent behavior across voice, video, and real-time interaction

entities.name: Triangulation
entities.context: Method of verification through multiple independent data points, borrowed from navigation and forensic science

entities.name: Integrity verification
entities.context: Process of assessing character through behavioral consistency rather than deep interrogation

entities.name: Cognitive cost of deception
entities.context: Principle that maintaining lies across multiple sensory channels is exponentially harder than in a single medium

entities.name: Hiring process design
entities.context: V's belief that hiring should structurally test for cross-channel coherence to filter performers

relationships.context: Triangulation is the method that enables cross-channel consistency verification
Channel consistency serves as the mechanism for verifying integrity
The cognitive expense of deception is why cross-channel testing works as a filter
V believes hiring should use triangulation to test candidate consistency
